description: Configure Moodle's Web Services API for an external Student Information System (SIS) integration. Log in as admin (admin / Admin1234!). Enable Web Services and the REST protocol. Create a user 'sis_integration' (Password: 'SisIntegration123!', First name: 'SIS', Last name: 'Integration') with the system-level 'Manager' role. Set up an external service named 'SIS User Sync' (Short name: 'sis_sync') with 'Authorized users only' enabled. Include the functions core_user_create_users, core_user_update_users, and core_user_get_users in the service. Authorize the 'sis_integration' user for this service and generate a web service token for that user.
